meta.title: Why did the US cancel its new Constellation-class frigate?
meta.description:
Go to https://winglorespirits.com now to learn more about Winglore's incredible story, their high-quality spirits, and how you can become a part of their growing legend. (Must be 21 or older)

-- BREAK --

After eight years of development and billions of dollars invested, the US Navy is cancelling its Constellation-class frigate program — an effort that was meant to produce potentially as many as 58 warships in the coming decades. 

This troubled program is over budget, behind schedule, and a prime example of scope creep in Defense acquisitions... But canceling it still puts the US Navy in a difficult position.
